headline: Rothschild Revisits Moody’s (MCO) Price Target
summary: Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) is one of the 9 Best Stocks to Buy in Chris Hohn’s TCI Fund Portfolio. Rothschild & Co Redburn raised the price target on Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) from $490 to $500 on June 18, 2026. The firm’s analyst Charles Bendit kept a Neutral rating on the shares. Rothschild adjusted ratings across the […]

headline: Moody’s (MCO) Expands AWS AI Integration as Analyst Sees Durable Value in Proprietary Data
summary: Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) is one of the best stocks to buy now for good returns. On June 16, Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) integrated its data services with Amazon Quick, an agentic AI assistant developed by Amazon Web Services (AWS). Its data and research services are now accessible through the AI assistant via a Model Context Protocol […]
